message:
feat(docusign): add recipient management, resend, document list, and template creation

Add 5 new operations: update_recipients, add_tabs, resend_envelope,
list_documents, create_from_template. DocuSign connector now has 15
operations covering full envelope lifecycle. All tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
 min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
 protocol_features = []
 max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:122f51ca25f7d300fe39349a2c90c3d6d2458d04ebb387050bf4312c913df71f"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:8254e56df582c9f41b517aba31ea915551c911909d06a78c1c6312694531f1fe"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.docusign"
@@ -667,6 +667,356 @@ related = [
     "docusign.list_envelopes",
 ]
 
+[provides.operations."docusign.update_recipients"]
+description = "Update existing recipients on an envelope"
+capability = "docusign.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "best_effort"

+[provides.operations."docusign.update_recipients".input_schema]
+required = [
+    "account_id",
+    "envelope_id",
+    "recipients",
+]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."docusign.update_recipients".input_schema.properties.account_id]
+description = "DocuSign account ID"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."docusign.update_recipients".input_schema.properties.envelope_id]
+description = "Envelope ID to modify"

+description = "Recipients object with updated signers, carbonCopies, etc."

+
+[provides.operations."docusign.update_recipients".output_schema]

+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."docusign.update_recipients".output_schema.properties.recipients]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."docusign.update_recipients".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.docusign.net",
+    "*.docusign.com",
+    "demo.docusign.net",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."docusign.update_recipients".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Update existing recipients on an envelope (change email, name, routing order)."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Updating recipients on a completed or voided envelope.",
+    "Not including the recipientId for existing recipients being updated.",

+examples = ['{"account_id": "abc-123", "envelope_id": "env-456", "recipients": {"signers": [{"recipientId": "1", "email": "newemail@example.com", "name": "Updated Name"}]}}']
+related = [
+    "docusign.add_recipients",
+    "docusign.get_envelope",

+[provides.operations."docusign.add_tabs"]

+require_sni = true

+[provides.operations."docusign.add_tabs".ai_hints]

+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true

+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true

+total_timeout_ms = 60000

+[provides.operations."docusign.create_from_template".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Create a new envelope from an existing template, assigning recipients to template roles."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Not providing all required template roles defined in the template.",

+]
+examples = ['{"account_id": "abc-123", "template_id": "tmpl-789", "template_roles": [{"roleName": "Signer", "name": "Alice", "email": "alice@example.com"}], "status": "created"}']
+related = [
+    "docusign.get_template",
+    "docusign.list_templates",
+    "docusign.create_envelope",
+]
+
 [provides.operations."docusign.void_envelope"]
 description = "Void (cancel) a sent envelope that has not been completed"
 capability = "docusign.send"
@@ -785,3 +1135,8 @@ scope = "instance"
 "docusign.send_envelope" = ["docusign.send"]
 "docusign.get_envelope" = ["docusign.read"]
 "docusign.void_envelope" = ["docusign.send"]
+"docusign.update_recipients" = ["docusign.write"]
+"docusign.add_tabs" = ["docusign.write"]
+"docusign.resend_envelope" = ["docusign.write"]
+"docusign.list_documents" = ["docusign.read"]
+"docusign.create_from_template" = ["docusign.write"]

@@ -339,6 +339,83 @@ impl DocuSignClient {
 
     // -- Documents --
 
+    /// Update existing recipients on an envelope.
+    pub async fn update_recipients(
+        &self,
+        account_id: &str,
+        envelope_id: &str,
+        recipients: &serde_json::Value,
+    ) -> DocuSignResult<serde_json::Value> {
+        self.put(
+            &format!("/{account_id}/envelopes/{envelope_id}/recipients"),
+            recipients,
+        )
+        .await
+    }
+
+    /// Add tabs/fields to an envelope recipient.
+    pub async fn add_tabs(
+        &self,
+        account_id: &str,
+        envelope_id: &str,
+        recipient_id: &str,
+        tabs: &serde_json::Value,
+    ) -> DocuSignResult<serde_json::Value> {
+        self.post(
+            &format!("/{account_id}/envelopes/{envelope_id}/recipients/{recipient_id}/tabs"),
+            tabs,
+        )
+        .await
+    }
+
+    /// Resend notifications for an envelope.
+    pub async fn resend_envelope(
+        &self,
+        account_id: &str,
+        envelope_id: &str,
+    ) -> DocuSignResult<serde_json::Value> {
+        let url = format!(
+            "{}/{account_id}/envelopes/{envelope_id}?resend_envelope=true",
+            self.base_url
+        );
+        let body = serde_json::json!({"status": "sent"});
+        let req = self
+            .add_auth(self.client.put(&url))
+            .header("Accept", "application/json")
+            .json(&body);
+        let resp = req.send().await?;
+        self.handle_response(resp).await
+    }
+
+    /// List documents in an envelope.
+    pub async fn list_documents(
+        &self,
+        account_id: &str,
+        envelope_id: &str,
+    ) -> DocuSignResult<serde_json::Value> {
+        self.get(
+            &format!("/{account_id}/envelopes/{envelope_id}/documents"),
+            None,
+        )
+        .await
+    }
+
+    /// Create an envelope from a template.
+    pub async fn create_from_template(
+        &self,
+        account_id: &str,
+        template_id: &str,
+        roles: &serde_json::Value,
+        status: Option<&str>,
+    ) -> DocuSignResult<serde_json::Value> {
+        let body = serde_json::json!({
+            "templateId": template_id,
+            "templateRoles": roles,
+            "status": status.unwrap_or("created"),
+        });
+        self.post(&format!("/{account_id}/envelopes"), &body).await
+    }
+
     /// Download documents (combined PDF by default).
     pub async fn download_documents(
         &self,

@@ -4790,14 +4790,19 @@ fn docusign_full_manifest_parses_with_all_operations() {
     let ops = &parsed.provides.operations;
     let expected_ops = [
         "docusign.add_recipients",
+        "docusign.add_tabs",
         "docusign.create_envelope",
+        "docusign.create_from_template",
         "docusign.download_documents",
         "docusign.get_envelope",
         "docusign.get_template",
+        "docusign.list_documents",
         "docusign.list_envelopes",
         "docusign.list_templates",
+        "docusign.resend_envelope",
         "docusign.send_envelope",
         "docusign.stream_connect_events",
+        "docusign.update_recipients",
         "docusign.void_envelope",
     ];
     for op_name in &expected_ops {
